findings.description: 4,198 lines in a single file. Contains Claude parsing, Codex parsing, file caching, change tracking, archive integration, and debug reporting.
findings.suggestion: Split into claude_parser.rs, codex_parser.rs, and cache.rs (target <1,500 lines each).

findings.description: 1,818 lines for float ball commands, including complex platform-specific window management.
findings.suggestion: Extract platform-specific positioning into platform/ modules.

findings.description: 1,536 lines mixing IPC commands with data aggregation logic.
findings.suggestion: Extract data aggregation into usage/ssh_aggregation.rs.

findings.description: 1,063 lines — largest Svelte component with embedded drag interaction and platform logic.
findings.suggestion: Extract drag interaction and platform logic into separate modules.

findings.description: 994 lines of legacy fallback parser, marked #[allow(dead_code)].
findings.suggestion: Confirm if still needed. If not, move to archive/.

findings.description: FIXED: Dedup hash now uses only message_id:request_id. Test: claude_dedupe_collapses_root_and_sidechain_and_prefers_subagent_scope.
findings.suggestion: No action needed.

findings.description: FIXED: upsert_claude_entry() + should_prefer_claude_entry() keeps entry with highest output_tokens. Test: parse_claude_dedupe_keeps_latest_output_tokens.
findings.suggestion: No action needed.

findings.description: 525-line factory closure with 19 internal state variables and 11 methods. High cognitive complexity.
findings.suggestion: Break into smaller composable functions or a class.

findings.description: catch_unwind() for window positioning fallback masks panics without logging the cause.
findings.suggestion: Log the panic cause before falling back.

findings.description: 6 empty catch blocks, all intentionally documented with comments.
findings.suggestion: No action needed.

findings.description: Tray icon click handler and menu Show handler contain nearly identical platform-dispatch positioning code (3 duplicated blocks).
findings.suggestion: Extract show_and_position_window(window, tray_rect?) helper.

findings.description: Similar timestamp parsing with multiple fallback formats duplicated across both files.
findings.suggestion: Centralize timestamp parsing into a shared util.

findings.description: Hardcoded exchange rates (EUR 0.92, GBP 0.79, JPY 149.5, CNY 7.24). Comment says 'updated 2025-03' — over a year stale.
findings.suggestion: Fetch rates from a public API or bump manually more often.

findings.description: Hardcoded update check intervals (10s initial, 6h check, 12-24h backoff) without configuration.
findings.suggestion: Consider making configurable via settings.

findings.description: CLAUDE_MIN_REFETCH_SECS = 300 (5 min) hardcoded.
findings.suggestion: Document the constant; consider making configurable if needed.

findings.description: 32 #[allow(dead_code)] annotations. Concentrated in parser.rs (8), updater/ (7), scheduler.rs (6).
findings.suggestion: Audit each: remove truly dead code, remove annotation for test-only or cfg-gated code.

findings.description: Legacy parser module (994 lines) marked #[allow(dead_code)]. May be unreachable.
findings.suggestion: Confirm if any code path reaches it. If not, archive.

findings.description: captureResizeDebugSnapshot() returns empty object — stub from removed debug overlay.
findings.suggestion: Remove if debug overlay won't return.

findings.description: Hardcoded URL: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/BerriAI/litellm/main/model_prices_and_context_window.json
findings.suggestion: Add fallback URL or cache-on-failure behavior. No retry on failure.

findings.description: Hardcoded URL: https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/models
findings.suggestion: Add fallback or cache-on-failure behavior.

findings.description: Hardcoded Anthropic API URLs for OAuth rate limit fetching.
findings.suggestion: Stable endpoints; acceptable but document in one central place.

findings.description: Tray icon hardcoded at 44x44 pixels (appropriate for @2x retina).
findings.suggestion: Acceptable for current use.

findings.description: Plan tier costs hardcoded (Pro: $20, Max 5x: $100, etc.).
findings.suggestion: Anthropic/OpenAI public pricing — acceptable to hardcode.

findings.description: All 7 runtime deps are @tauri-apps/* plugins, caret-pinned to ^2.x. Clean and focused.
findings.suggestion: No action needed.

findings.description: 3 platform-conditional dependency blocks (macOS: objc2/security-framework, Windows: windows 0.58, Linux: gtk/webkit2gtk/cairo). Appropriate for cross-platform.
findings.suggestion: No action needed.

findings.description: No explicit SSH connection timeout. ssh2 crate connections can hang indefinitely on network issues.
findings.suggestion: Add session.set_timeout(30_000) or equivalent.

findings.description: reqwest client created without explicit timeout.
findings.suggestion: Add .timeout(Duration::from_secs(15)) to client builder.

tidy_recommendations.description: Move legacy parser to archive/ if confirmed dead
Same as F-005 — legacy module removal
Remove captureResizeDebugSnapshot() stub if debug overlay won't return

files_to_optimize.description: Split 4,198-line monolith into provider-specific parsers + cache layer
Break 525-line factory closure into smaller composable functions
Log panic cause in catch_unwind before fallback
Update or auto-fetch stale exchange rates

duplication_groups.description: Tray click and menu Show handlers duplicate platform positioning code
Timestamp parsing with multiple fallback formats duplicated

structure_splits.description: Extract platform-specific positioning into platform/ modules
Extract drag interaction and platform logic into separate modules

resolved.question: Is ccusage.rs still a live fallback path?
Is the 5-minute refetch constant intentionally non-configurable?
Does any runtime code path still invoke ccusage.rs?
Will the resize debug overlay be restored?
